clarification_questions: What was the business purpose of this meal? (e.g., client entertainment, employee working meal, team meeting, travel meal, etc.)
Who attended this meal? (e.g., clients, employees, prospective customers)

output_debit_classifier.reason: Meal expenses can map to different accounts depending on business purpose: client entertainment (Meals & Entertainment Expense, 50% deductible), employee working meal during overtime (Employee Benefits), travel meal (Travel Expense), team meeting (Office Expense), etc. The transaction text does not provide enough context to determine which account is appropriate, and this affects both the account classification and potential tax treatment.
